title: Users
userManagementSubtitle: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions across the platform
createFirstUser: Create your first user to get started
failedToLoad: Failed to load users. Please refresh.

tabs.actionLogPlaceholder: Action log will be available soon.
tabs.approvalConfigurationPlaceholder: Approval configuration will be available soon.
tabs.rolePermissionsPlaceholder: Role permissions will be available soon.

createModal.title: Create a new user account
createModal.subtitle: Fill in the details below to invite a new team member to your company.
createModal.createError: Failed to create user. Please try again.
createModal.emailInUse: This email is already in use within your company.

createUserPage.title: Create a new user account
createUserPage.subtitle: Fill in the details below to invite a new team member.
createUserPage.userDetailsSubtitle: Enter the representative's details to send an invitation.

addCompanyModal.createContractorSubtitle: Add a new contractor company to the platform.
addCompanyModal.createVendorSubtitle: Add a new vendor company to the platform.
addCompanyModal.createError: Failed to create company. Please try again.

invitationSuccess.title: Invitation has been sent successfully
invitationSuccess.subtitle: An invitation has been sent to the provided email address.
invitationSuccess.emailSent: The user {{email}} will receive an activation email with instructions to set up their account.
invitationSuccess.linkExpiry: The activation link will expire in 72 hours.
invitationSuccess.redirecting: Redirecting to 'User Management' page in {{seconds}} seconds…

editModal.title: Edit User Details
editModal.subtitle: Update the user's personal information and account details.
editModal.updateError: Failed to update user. Please try again.

editCompanyModal.title: Edit Company Details
editCompanyModal.subtitle: Update the company information and details.
editCompanyModal.updateError: Failed to update company. Please try again.

activateModal.title: Activate User
activateModal.subtitle: This user will regain access to the system immediately.
activateModal.info: You are going to activate the user {{email}}. After changing the status, the user will be able to log in again and will receive a notification by email.

resetPasswordModal.title: Reset Password
resetPasswordModal.subtitle: The user will receive an email to set a new password.
resetPasswordModal.info: A password reset link will be sent to {{email}}. The user will need to follow the link to create a new password.

deactivateModal.title: Deactivate User
deactivateModal.subtitle: This user will lose access to the system immediately. They will not be able to log in until reactivated.
deactivateModal.info: You are going to deactivate the user {{email}}. After changing the status, the user will receive a message by email.

activationSuccess.title: Activation Successful
activationSuccess.description: The user {{email}} has been successfully activated. They now have access to the system.
activationSuccess.note: An email notification has been sent to the user.
activationSuccess.redirecting: Redirecting to User Management page in {{seconds}} seconds...

deactivationSuccess.title: Deactivation Successful
deactivationSuccess.description: The user {{email}} has been successfully deactivated. They will no longer have access to the system until reactivated.
deactivationSuccess.note: An email notification has been sent to the user.
deactivationSuccess.redirecting: Redirecting to User Management page in {{seconds}} seconds...

resetPasswordSuccess.title: Reset Password
resetPasswordSuccess.subtitle: Password reset instructions sent
resetPasswordSuccess.info: We've sent password reset instructions to {{email}}.
resetPasswordSuccess.redirecting: Redirecting to "User Management" page in {{seconds}} seconds...

bulkDeactivateModal.title: Deactivate All Users
bulkDeactivateModal.subtitle: All users in this company will lose access immediately.
bulkDeactivateModal.info: You are about to deactivate all users in {{company}}. After changing their status, they will no longer be able to log in and will each receive a notification by email.

bulkActivateModal.title: Activate All Users
bulkActivateModal.subtitle: All users in this company will regain access immediately.
bulkActivateModal.info: You are about to activate all users in {{company}}. After changing their status, they will be able to log in again and will each receive a notification by email.

bulkDeactivateSuccess: All users in {{company}} have been deactivated.
bulkActivateSuccess: All users in {{company}} have been activated.
bulkActionPartialError: Some users could not be updated. Please check individual statuses.

cancelInvitationModal.title: Cancel Invitation
cancelInvitationModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
cancelInvitationModal.info: You are about to cancel the invitation for {{email}} . This will permanently remove their account from the platform.

detail.confirmDeactivateMessage: {{name}} will lose access immediately and be notified by email.
detail.confirmReactivateMessage: {{name}} will regain access to the platform.
detail.confirmResendMessage: A new invitation email will be sent to {{email}}. The previous link will be invalidated.
detail.confirmCancelMessage: This will permanently delete {{name}}'s account. This action cannot be undone.
